content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Found one correctness issue in the force-complete reconciliation path. `nix build` passed on this checkout.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:2389 passes all terminal findings into covered-by-existing reconciliation before force-completed findings are filtered, and src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1896 plus src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1963 then posts/flushed br comments for every covered_by_existing_bead finding. A force-completed round containing a fix_current_bead amendment plus a covered_by_existing_bead deferral will therefore mutate the target bead, even though non-propose_new_bead deferrals are supposed to stay in the journal for operator decision. Filter force_completed findings out of covered-by-existing reconciliation and add a mixed-classification regression for this case.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This violates the force-complete deferral contract and can create durable bead side effects for classifications that should remain journal-only.
